rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HOLBROOK EDWIN KIDD KOHRT
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition Requesting Order Pursuant To Probate Code Section 850
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/28/17. A filed stamped courtesy paper copy of all electronically filed documents requiring Court review or action needed to have been delivered not later than 1:30 p.m. of the day following electronic filing [Local Rule 2.11T]. Filed stamped copy must be delivered to Room 202 no later than 3 court days prior to continued hearing date, along with a proposed order. Note: courtesy copy of the objections have been received.
